description_long: This is a large, rectangular metal dumpster with a robust, industrial design, commonly found in urban environments for waste collection. The exterior features vertical reinforcement panels along the sides and ends, providing structural strength and a utilitarian appearance. The top surface is flat and segmented, likely indicating a solid, non-opening lid or cover, with no visible hinges, handles, or access points. The color is a uniform dark gray, giving it a subdued, functional look suitable for blending into cityscapes or service areas. There are no visible wheels, handles, or warning labels, suggesting it is designed to be stationary and accessed by specialized equipment. The overall construction appears heavy-duty, intended for outdoor placement in commercial or municipal waste management settings.
description: A large, dark gray, rectangular metal dumpster with reinforced vertical panels and a flat, solid top. It has a heavy-duty, utilitarian design with no visible handles, wheels, or labels.
description_view_0: End view showing four vertical reinforcement panels and a flat, solid top surface.
description_view_1: Side view displaying eight vertical panels and the full length of the flat top.
description_view_2: Opposite end view, identical to view 0, with four vertical panels and a flat top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, with eight vertical panels and a flat top.
attribute_lid_type: flat, solid, non-opening lid; single section; steel; no visible locking or opening mechanisms
